hero_subtitle: Every cigarette is a step toward the grave. Stop!
stats_item1: Every 6 seconds someone dies from smoking
stats_item4: 90% of lung cancer cases are due to smoking
myth1_text: There's no safe dose of nicotine. Light cigarettes have the same poisons.
myth2_text: It's an illusion: nicotine withdrawal creates stress, and a cigarette just temporarily relieves it.
myth3_text: Only the first 3 days are tough. Millions have quit – you can too!
tip1: Pick a quit date and tell your friends
tip2: Get rid of all cigarettes and ashtrays
tip3: Drink plenty of water, chew sugar-free gum
tip4: Replace the habit with sports or a hobby
tip5: See a doctor or try nicotine replacement therapy
harm_intro: Smoking destroys you from the inside:
story1: Anna, 34: 'Smoked for 15 years, quit in a month. Sense of smell returned, started running.'
story2: Max, 28: 'Thought I'd never quit. Lozenges and sports helped. One year smoke-free.'
story3: Elena, 52: '30-year habit. Quit after a heart attack. Life got brighter.'
faq_a1: Acute symptoms pass in 3-7 days. Psychological craving may persist for months but gets weaker.
faq_a2: No. Vapes contain nicotine and harmful chemicals, just a different form of addiction.
faq_a3: Don't blame yourself. Analyze the cause and keep trying. Every relapse is a lesson.
